subject: feat(layout): add section reorder with move up/down buttons
body:
Users can now swap adjacent rows/columns in the Structure tab. Select a
section and use Move Up/Down (rows) or Move Left/Right (columns) to
reorder. All per-cell data (text, images, overlays, padding, frames,
alignments) follows the content via a bidirectional cell index remap.

New swapCellIndices utility in cellUtils.js handles the remap. The
setLayout function in useAdState.js processes _cellSwap metadata
alongside the existing _cellShift mechanism.

Tags: layout, structure, reorder, ux
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: medium
Debt: neutral
Epic: section-reorder
Semver: minor

title: add section reorder with move up/down buttons
